## Checklist

- [ ] Branched from `dev` (or `main` only if this is a `hotfix/`)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] Tested in both light and dark mode (for UI changes)
- [ ] No player-facing copy says "rake" or "Banker" (use "platform fee" / "Host")

<!--
Promotion/reconciliation PRs (dev → main, or main → dev): merge with a
MERGE COMMIT, never squash — squashing breaks branch ancestry. See CONTRIBUTING.md.
-->
